stemHtml: Which statement concerning the tropopause is correct?

options.a: In the ICAO standard atmosphere the tropopause lies lower over the poles than over the equator.
options.b: The layer just above the tropopause is absolutely stable.
options.c: Above the tropopause no clear air turbulence occurs.
options.d: The temperature at the tropopause is approximately 80°C over the poles and approximately 40°C over the equator.
